name: principles-list
prompt: Clean principles typography. White background. Title "Core Principles" in small grey caps at top. Below, four lines of text, each starting with a number in ember orange (#D95B43): "1. Data drives decisions", "2. Automation over repetition", "3. Simplicity scales", "4. Impact matters". Numbers in ember, text in charcoal (#1c1c1d). Clean Inter font. Left-aligned. Generous line spacing. No bullets, icons, or decorations.
